children.text: Configure your information that the Droid will use to communicate with you and provide its services in a personalized way. The data are not used in any way for commercial or marketing purposes.
Registering an account allows you to synchronize and restore upgrades and XP points in your devices. In order to use this service you need an active data connection.
Customize the number of words that Databot can use at maximum, to prepare presentations in thematic modules (Person, Character, ...).
Customize number of images that DataBot can uses inside presentations. Decrease to improve performance.
By default following a short answer, the droid if further relevant informations are available leads you to the page answer. You can change this behavior by disabling this option.
